alt_text: Teaching diagram of the epistemological triad. A large green circle labelled 'علم / Knowledge' surrounds an image of Earth labelled 'معلوم / Known'. To the right stands a human silhouette labelled 'عالم / Knower'. A blue arrow at bottom-left reads 'Must exist'.
notes: Pedagogical: 'ilm (knowledge) requires both ma'lum (known) and 'alim (knower); the trio is mutually entailed. Standard Islamic epistemology used to derive divine attributes.
